Make a Difference With Your Career

Join a mission-driven team committed to providing quality healthcare to everyone in our community.

Physicians, nurse practitioners, dentists, behavioral health providers, and other clinical roles.

Why CMC

Benefits & Perks

💰

Competitive Compensation

Market-rate salaries that reflect your experience and expertise.

🏖️

Generous Leave

Paid vacation, sick time, and holiday coverage so you can recharge.

🩺

Comprehensive Insurance

Medical, dental, vision, life, AD&D, disability, EAP, and retirement plans.

📚

Professional Development

Ongoing education, certification support, free CME credits, and loan repayment programs.

Additional Benefits

  • ✓ HRSA, SLRP, CAL HealthCares, HCAi, and Song Brown loan repayment programs
  • ✓ Free CME credits for clinical staff
  • ✓ Flexible spending accounts with dependent care matching
  • ✓ 403(b) retirement savings plan
Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I apply?
Submit your application online through the job boards below. Internal applicants can apply through Paycom ESS. Students are welcome to email their resume to careers@cmcenters.org.
How long does the hiring process take?
You'll receive an immediate confirmation from Paycom after submitting. High-volume roles typically take 4–6 weeks from application to offer.
What does the interview process look like?
Most interviews are conducted via Zoom with a panel format. Some administrative roles may include an in-person component.
Can I apply to more than one position?
Yes — you're welcome to apply to multiple positions simultaneously if you meet the qualifications for each.
Will I hear back about my application status?
Yes. We send email updates at each stage of the hiring process so you're never left wondering.
Do I need to submit a cover letter?
A cover letter is optional, but we encourage it. It's a great opportunity to share why you're passionate about community health.
What loan repayment programs are available?
As an FQHC, CMC qualifies for multiple federal and state loan repayment programs including HRSA NHSC, SLRP, CAL HealthCares, HCAi, and Song Brown.
Our Culture

Why Work at CMC?

Community Medical Centers is a Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC) serving the Central Valley. We are a diverse, family-oriented organization where every team member has the opportunity to make a real difference in the lives of patients who depend on us. From our clinical providers to our front-desk staff, everyone at CMC contributes to a mission that matters.

Questions? Email us at careers@cmcenters.org.

Stay Connected — Sign up for CMC News & Updates
